SimplePractice vs TherapyNotes: Which is Better for Solo Therapists?
A comprehensive comparison of SimplePractice and TherapyNotes to help solo therapists choose the best practice management software for their needs.

# SimplePractice vs TherapyNotes: Which is Better for Solo Therapists?

Choosing the right practice management software is one of the most important decisions you'll make as a solo therapist. The right platform can streamline your workflows, simplify billing, and help you focus on what matters most—your clients.

In this comparison, we'll break down SimplePractice and TherapyNotes, two of the most popular options for solo therapists in the US, UK, Australia, and Canada.

## Quick Verdict

**SimplePractice** is ideal for therapists who prioritize ease of use and a modern interface, while **TherapyNotes** excels for those who need robust billing features and insurance claim management.

[AFFILIATE_LINK_SimplePractice]

[AFFILIATE_LINK_TherapyNotes]

## Pricing and Plans

### SimplePractice Pricing

SimplePractice offers a 30-day free trial, after which plans start at:

- **Essentials**: $29/month - Includes scheduling, note templates, and telehealth
- **Professional**: $49/month - Adds client portal and billing
- **Premium**: $79/month - Includes all features plus custom branding

### TherapyNotes Pricing

TherapyNotes offers a 30-day free trial with plans starting at:

- **Standard**: $39/month - Includes scheduling, notes, and billing
- **Professional**: $59/month - Adds insurance claim management
- **Enterprise**: Custom pricing for larger practices

## Features Comparison

### Appointment Scheduling

Both platforms offer intuitive scheduling tools, but there are differences:

- **SimplePractice**: More modern interface, better drag-and-drop functionality
- **TherapyNotes**: Better for complex scheduling needs, multiple providers

### Clinical Notes

Both offer robust note templates:

- SimplePractice has 43+ templates
- TherapyNotes has 60+ templates

### Billing and Insurance

**TherapyNotes has the edge here** with more comprehensive insurance billing features:

- Electronic claims submission
- Real-time eligibility verification
- ERA/EOB auto-posting
- Superbill generation

SimplePractice offers these features but at higher tiers.

### Telehealth

Both include HIPAA-compliant telehealth:

- **SimplePractice**: Native video built-in
- **TherapyNotes**: Integration with Zoom for Business

## Pros and Cons

### SimplePractice

**Pros:**
- Intuitive, modern interface
- Excellent mobile app
- Great for solo practitioners
- Affordable entry-level pricing

**Cons:**
- Insurance billing requires Professional plan
- Some features locked behind higher tiers

### TherapyNotes

**Pros:**
- Comprehensive insurance billing
- Robust reporting features
- Excellent customer support
- All-inclusive Standard plan

**Cons:**
- Interface feels dated
- Steeper learning curve
- Mobile app not as polished

## Who Should Choose Which?

### Choose SimplePractice if:
- You're just starting your practice
- You prefer a modern, intuitive interface
- You primarily take private pay clients
- You want excellent mobile functionality

### Choose TherapyNotes if:
- You handle a lot of insurance billing
- You need comprehensive reporting
- You want all features in one tier
- You prefer more control over your workflow

## Head to Head Comparison

| Feature | SimplePractice | TherapyNotes |
|---------|----------------|--------------|
| Free Trial | 30 days | 30 days |
| Starting Price | $29/month | $39/month |
| Insurance Billing | Yes (Professional+) | Yes (Standard) |
| Telehealth | Native | Via Zoom |
| Note Templates | 43+ | 60+ |
| Mobile App | Excellent | Good |
| Client Portal | Yes | Yes |
| Appointment Reminders | Yes | Yes |

## FAQ

### Is SimplePractice HIPAA compliant?

Yes, SimplePractice is fully HIPAA compliant and offers Business Associate Agreements (BAAs) for all paid plans.

### Does TherapyNotes offer a mobile app?

Yes, TherapyNotes offers mobile apps for both iOS and Android devices.

### Can I switch from one platform to the other?

Both platforms allow you to export your data, though the process can be time-consuming. Consider starting a free trial of both before committing.

### Do either offer EHR certification?

Both SimplePractice and TherapyNotes are ONC-certified EHR systems, making them eligible for MIPS reporting and other incentive programs.

### What about customer support?

SimplePractice offers email support and an extensive knowledge base. TherapyNotes offers phone, email, and chat support during business hours.

## Conclusion

Both SimplePractice and TherapyNotes are excellent choices for solo therapists. Your decision should come down to your specific needs:

- **Choose SimplePractice** for its modern interface, ease of use, and strong telehealth features
- **Choose TherapyNotes** for its superior insurance billing capabilities and comprehensive feature set

Whichever you choose, both platforms will help you run a more efficient practice so you can focus on what matters most—helping your clients.
